t: Not a clinical diagnosis — forensic topic.
Structured risk assessment in forensic context (HCR-20, VRAG).
CBT — impulse control, trigger management, exposure to alternative behavior.
Treatment of comorbid disorders (therapeutic limit in ASPD, behavioral intervention in ID, stimulant in ADHD).
Behavioral intervention, specific for ID, ADHD.
Evidence base is limited; comorbid disorder and psychosocial support determine prognosis.
Most arson motivation-based (financial, revenge) — pyromania not; ~3–10% meet clinical diagnosis.
Myth 2: "Pyromania is only a childhood phenomenon"
onset typically in adolescence, but can persist into adulthood.
No FDA approval; SSRIs off-label, evidence base limited.
Clinical intervention and comorbidity treatment reduce relapse risk.
Burton P.R., McNiel D.E., Binder R.L. Firesetting, arson, pyromania, and the forensic mental health expert. J Am Acad Psychiatry Law 2012;40(3):355–365.
